title: [prompt_evolution_v4_20251028]
content:
[prompt_evolution_v4_20251028]
TL;DR: This is an outstanding, academic-level critique. I've integrated its suggestions with v3.0 to produce v4.0. The key upgrades are:
* Framework: The prompt now explicitly specifies a LangGraph-style cyclical framework for orchestration, with CrewAI/AutoGen for the swarm.
* Security & Scalability: Adds runtime security monitoring during swarm execution and a "Scalability Assessment" in the analysis phase.
* Governance: Adds HRG Timeouts to prevent stalls and tasks to generate ETHICS.md and GOVERNANCE.md files.
* Richer Analysis: Upgrades Phase 4 to include "Ethical & Bias Audits," "Dependency Graph Analysis," and (optionally) querying live cloud cost APIs for precision.
* Dynamic Swarm: Adds "Dynamic Agent Spawning" based on task complexity.
* Interoperability: Expands the ecosystem to include scaffolding for external CI/CD tools and a Streamlit dashboard for the HRGs.
Acknowledgment of Critique [GRK-ACK-02]
This "Grok revisions" document provides a robust, expert-level analysis of the v2.0 framework, correctly identifying its remaining theoretical blindspots (scalability, runtime security) and proposing concrete, modern tooling (LangGraph, CrewAI, Prometheus) to address them.
